headline: QQQ vs VGT: Which Tech ETF Is Better?
summary: Investors looking for the best tech ETF might be disappointed to discover that a lot of the Invesco QQQ ETF's portfolio isn't actually tech.

headline: SpaceX IPO Could Create ‘The Biggest Short Squeeze’ of All Time on Index Funds. Here’s How That Happens.
summary: The phrase sounds almost impossible: a short squeeze involving index funds. After all, index funds are designed to be passive, rules-based buyers, not active traders caught on the wrong side of a position. Yet that is exactly the scenario Animal Spirits hosts Michael Batnick and Ben Carlson laid out on Episode 467, “The Biggest Short ... SpaceX IPO Could Create ‘The Biggest Short Squeeze’ of All Time on Index Funds. Here’s How That Happens.

headline: Assessing Whether Amgen (AMGN) Is Slightly Undervalued After Recent Share Price Gains
summary: Amgen stock snapshot and recent performance Amgen (AMGN) is drawing attention after recent price moves, with the stock last closing at US$349.58. Over the past month it gained about 5.6%, while over the past 3 months it declined roughly 5.4%. See our latest analysis for Amgen. The recent 1-day share price return of 1.15% and 7-day return of 3.8% build on a 30-day share price gain of 5.6%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 24% and 3-year total shareholder return of about 75% point...
